thesis_one_liner: Global G-SIB trading on tangible book plus bounded franchise and capital-release options; proof-backed base economic value $107/sh vs ~$135 price implies sub-hurdle return.
key_assumptions: FY2025 TBVPS $97.06 anchors tangible common equity; low case $72/sh after credit friction
Normalized franchise value $15/sh assumes through-cycle RoTCE above cost of equity after transformation
Excess-capital component $10/sh requires CET1 headroom net of management buffer and 55% realization probability
Stress reserve -$15/sh equals 1.23× reported ACL per share under severe-cycle judgment
open_questions: Segment tangible capital and RoTCE not fully disclosed in public filings
Timing of transformation expense fade and distributable capital release
Integrated severe CET1 stress bridge under correlated consumer and funding losses
